name: Vitaly Yushmanov
title: Baritone
bio: Vitaly Yushmanov is an internationally acclaimed baritone known for his profound resonance, exceptional vocal range, and compelling stage presence. Born in St. Petersburg, Russia, he has established himself as a versatile artist across the world's most prestigious opera houses and concert halls.

His repertoire spans from the dramatic roles of Verdi and Puccini to the nuanced lieder of Tchaikovsky and Rachmaninoff. With a career that took flight in Tokyo, Vitaly has become a bridge between Eastern and Western musical traditions, celebrated for his interpretations of both classical European opera and contemporary works.

Beyond his performance career, Vitaly is a dedicated educator, regularly conducting masterclasses for aspiring vocalists in Japan and Europe. He is also a prolific recording artist, with several critically acclaimed albums that showcase his mastery of the baritone repertoire.
